title: VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF THE CASCADES - 211info
text: VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF THE CASCADES VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF THE CASCADES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical care to low-income adults by using volunteer medical providers. Care may include primary and specialty medical care, prescription medication (no narcotics), and mental health care. Not a walk-in or urgent care clinic. Offers assistance enrolling and re-enrolling in the Oregon Health Plan. 2300 NE Neff Road Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are uninsured or ineligible for Affordable Care Act programs, live or work in service area, and have income less than 300% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday 4pm-8pm, Tuesday 11am-2pm and 4pm-8pm, Thursday 9am-1:30pm Email (541) 330-9001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 330-9001 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message with your name and number to schedule an appointment FEES: None; donations encouraged. Fees may be charged for prescriptions and lab tests. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the St. Charles Medical Center campus. From Neff Road: Enter via Williamson Boulevard. Turn left; second building on the left. From Purcell Boulevard: Turn right; second building on the right, next to Ronald McDonald House and across from The Center. Services: Community Clinics Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
